SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.util

Class DerParser.DerValue

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.util.DerParser.DerValue
Enclosing class:
DerParser
public static class DerParser.DerValue extends Object
Represents a parsed DER value with its tag and content.

      Get this value as a BIT STRING. Returns the bit string content (excluding the unused bits indicator).

      IOException
